inputs.label: Compression Ratio (r)
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of cylinder volume before compression (BDC) to volume after compression (TDC)

inputs.label: Specific Heat Ratio (k)
inputs.businessContext: Adiabatic index (cp/cv) of the working fluid, typically 1.4 for air

inputs.label: Initial Temperature (T1)
inputs.businessContext: Temperature at the start of compression stroke

inputs.label: Initial Pressure (P1)
inputs.businessContext: Pressure at the start of compression stroke (intake pressure)

inputs.label: Maximum Temperature (T3)
inputs.businessContext: Temperature after constant volume heat addition (combustion)

inputs.label: Specific Heat (Cv)
inputs.businessContext: Specific heat at constant volume of the working fluid (air ≈ 0.718 kJ/kg·K)

formulas.netWorkPerMass: specificHeatCv * (maxTemperature - initialTemperature * Math.pow(compressionRatio, specificHeatRatio - 1) - maxTemperature / Math.pow(compressionRatio, specificHeatRatio - 1) + initialTemperature)
